sizing_rule.note: Increase position size by 10% per win during winning streaks (≥2 consecutive wins) when equity gain ≥5% and current drawdown ≤10%. Primary trigger is consecutive wins; equity gain and drawdown conditions act as additional gates to limit sizing escalation during recovery phases.

source_rule_text: Increase position size during winning streaks and after profitable trades, but within defined limits, to capitalize on momentum while managing drawdown recovery risk.
